rules.headings: Uppercase, tracking-tight for H1/H2. Bold weights (700/800).
rules.body: High legibility, leading-relaxed. Grey-800 for contrast.

usage.primary_cta: bg-brand hover:bg-brand-dark text-white rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold
usage.secondary_cta: border-2 border-brand text-brand hover:bg-brand/5 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold

layout.spacing: Relaxed industrial. Section padding py-24 or py-32.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on dark sections.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-slate-200 for light cards. border-slate-700 for dark cards.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used sparingly in Hero overlays. backdrop-blur-md bg-white/10 border border-white/20

buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

variants.default: bg-[#0D9488] text-white hover:bg-[#115E59] shadow-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-bold h-12 px-8 rounded-sm
variants.outline: border-2 border-[#0D9488] bg-transparent text-[#0D9488] hover:bg-[#0D9488]/10 h-12 px-8 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold rounded-sm
variants.whatsapp: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#128C7E] text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 scale-100 hover:scale-110 flex items-center gap-2

cards.service_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-slate-200 p-8 hover:border-[#0D9488] transition-all duration-300

navigation.wrapper: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md
navigation.link: text-sm font-medium text-slate-600 hover:text-[#0D9488] uppercase tracking-wide transition-colors

content.headline: Soluções Industriais em Gestão de Resíduos

items.title: Coleta de Efluentes
items.desc: Frota especializada para remoção de efluentes industriais.

items.title: Documentação Legal

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Do not use gradients. Stick to flat, bold colors. Use uppercase for all eyebrows and buttons. Focus on 'White space' vs 'Dense Technical Data'.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use framer-motion for simple fade-ins. Do not over-animate. Industrial clients want speed.
instructions_to_main_agent.interactive: The WhatsApp button must be visible at all times on mobile. Add a 'Pulse' effect to it.
instructions_to_main_agent.content: Use 'Lorem ipsum' only if strictly necessary, but prefer generating realistic Portuguese text related to waste management.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
